title: Windows Software (RFG Utilities) for Specific Ricoh MFPs and Printers - Potential Privilege Escalation
explanation: A potential privilege escalation vulnerability has been identified in RFG Utilities running on Windows.
affect:
This vulnerability may allow an attacker to gain elevated privileges (e.g., administrator rights), which could enable them to:
- Access or modify sensitive data
- Change system configurations
- Execute malicious code
checkVersion:
To check the version of RFG Utilities on Windows:
Launch RFG Utilities, then click the "i" button at the bottom of the window.
measures:
Please uninstall the existing RFG Utilities from your Windows system, and then install the latest successor software, Ricoh Utilities, from the following URL:
https://support.ricoh.com/bb/html/dr_ut_e/re2/model/f1195/f1195.htm

- To uninstall RFG Utilities, launch the application, go to the Tools menu, and click the Uninstall button.
- To download the latest Ricoh Utilities, go to the Printer Driver tab on the page above, then select Drivers and Utilities.
contact: Please contact your local Ricoh representative or dealer if you have any queries.
authenticityGuarantee: Please note that any copy or paraphrase of the text of this document that differs in content from the distribution URL link, or omits the URL, is an uncontrolled copy and may lack important information or contain factual errors.
